evals.prompt: I want to create a new starter for email notifications. Where do I put the files and how do I set up the auto-configuration?
evals.expected_output: Creates starters/email-starter/ with @AutoConfiguration, EnableConfigurationProperties, META-INF registration, marker class, and acme.email.* properties

evals.prompt: My custom starter's bean keeps getting created even when the library it wraps isn't on the classpath. How do I make it conditional?
evals.expected_output: Adds @ConditionalOnClass for the library's main class on the AutoConfiguration

evals.prompt: I need to add JPA repositories and entity scanning to my new starter. How do I do the package scanning correctly?
evals.expected_output: Creates a marker class and uses basePackageClasses on @ComponentScan, @EnableJpaRepositories, and @EntityScan

evals.prompt: How do I let services override the default bean from my starter?
evals.expected_output: Shows @ConditionalOnMissingBean on every @Bean method in the AutoConfiguration

evals.prompt: What property namespace should I use for my new audit-log-starter and where do I configure it?
evals.expected_output: Uses acme.audit-log.* prefix with a @ConfigurationProperties class, registers via @EnableConfigurationProperties
